title: Starfighters of the Galaxy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Starfighters of the Galaxy''''' was the name of a reference [[Holobook/Legends|holobook]] at the [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] library on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] once borrowed the holobook to learn more about space navigation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]''

[[Category:In-universe guides and reference books]]
